Title: User generates a report successfully
Preconditions: A user is logged into the system.
Test Steps:
1. User logs into the system.
2. User selects a report generation option.
3. User inputs valid report parameters.
4. ReportManager processes the request.
5. DataManager fetches the required data.
6. WebServer displays the generated report.
Expected Result: The system generates and displays the report correctly.

Title: User fails to generate a report due to invalid input
Preconditions: A user is logged into the system.
Test Steps:
1. User logs into the system.
2. User selects a report generation option.
3. User inputs invalid report parameters.
4. ReportManager processes the request.
5. DataManager attempts to fetch the required data but fails.
6. WebServer displays an error message.
Expected Result: The system displays an error message indicating invalid input.

Title: User generates a report with no data available
Preconditions: A user is logged into the system.
Test Data: User inputs report parameters for which no data is available.
Test Steps:
1. User logs into the system.
2. User selects a report generation option.
3. User inputs report parameters for which no data is available.
4. ReportManager processes the request.
5. DataManager attempts to fetch the required data but finds none.
6. WebServer displays an error message.
Expected Result: The system displays an error message indicating no data available.

Title: User generates a report with concurrent requests
Preconditions: Multiple users are logged into the system simultaneously.
Test Steps:
1. Multiple users log into the system simultaneously.
2. Each user selects a report generation option.
3. Each user inputs valid report parameters.
4. ReportManager processes the requests concurrently.
5. DataManager fetches the required data for each user.
6. WebServer displays the generated reports for each user.
Expected Result: The system handles concurrent requests without issues, generating and displaying reports for each user.
